# services.openvscode-server

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.openvscode-server`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.openvscode-server.connectionToken` | `null or string` | A secret that must be included with all requests. |
| `services.openvscode-server.connectionTokenFile` | `null or string` | Path to a file that contains the connection token. |
| `services.openvscode-server.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable openvscode-server. |
| `services.openvscode-server.extensionsDir` | `null or string` | Set the root path for extensions. |
| `services.openvscode-server.extraArguments` | `list of string` | Additional arguments to pass to openvscode-server. |
| `services.openvscode-server.extraEnvironment` | `attribute set of string` | Additional environment variables to pass to openvscode-server. |
| `services.openvscode-server.extraGroups` | `list of string` | An array of additional groups for the `openvscode-server` user. |
| `services.openvscode-server.extraPackages` | `list of package` | Additional packages to add to the openvscode-server {env}`PATH`. |
| `services.openvscode-server.group` | `string` | The group to run openvscode-server under. By default, a group named `openvscode-server` will be created. |
| `services.openvscode-server.host` | `string` | The host name or IP address the server should listen to. |
| `services.openvscode-server.package` | `package` | The openvscode-server package to use. |
| `services.openvscode-server.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port the server should listen to. If 0 is passed a random free port is picked. If a range in the format num-num is passed, a free port from the range (end inclusive) is selected. |
| `services.openvscode-server.serverDataDir` | `null or string` | Specifies the directory that server data is kept in. |
| `services.openvscode-server.socketPath` | `null or string` | The path to a socket file for the server to listen to. |
| `services.openvscode-server.telemetryLevel` | `null or one of "off", "crash", "error", "all"` | Sets the initial telemetry level. Valid levels are: 'off', 'crash', 'error' and 'all'. |
| `services.openvscode-server.user` | `string` | The user to run openvscode-server as. By default, a user named `openvscode-server` will be created. |
| `services.openvscode-server.userDataDir` | `null or string` | Specifies the directory that user data is kept in. Can be used to open multiple distinct instances of Code. |
| `services.openvscode-server.withoutConnectionToken` | `boolean` | Run without a connection token. Only use this if the connection is secured by other means. |
